items.title: ai-agent-architecture
items.summary: Build LLM systems you actually control. A free, open engineering book + course — from tokenization to serving your own models. Mechanisms, trade-offs, and numbers, not prompt tips
items.summary_cn: 构建您实际控制的LLM系统。一本免费、开放的工程书籍+课程--从令牌化到为您自己的模型服务。机制、权衡和数字，而不是提示提示
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: 10-ai-careers-roadmap
items.summary: Free, structured learning library for 10 AI careers paying $135K-$1M+ in 2026. Companion to the @exploraX_ article.
items.summary_cn: 2026年，为10个人工智能职业提供免费的结构化学习库，费用为13.5万至100万美元以上。@ exploraX_文章的伴侣。
items.comment: 开源项目值得支持，文档和社区活跃度比 star 数更重要。

items.title: Evaluating Open-Weight LLMs for Generating Structured Threat Information for Autonomous Vehicle Vulnerabilities
items.title_cn: 评估用于为自动驾驶汽车漏洞生成结构化威胁信息的开放式LLM
items.summary: Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) rely on interconnected software and hardware components, including sensors, Electronic Control Units, in-vehicle infotainment systems, and telematics units, where vulnerabilities can compromise assets, users, and vehicle operations. These vulnerabilities are ...
items.summary_cn: 联网车辆和自动驾驶车辆(CAV)依赖于互连的软件和硬件组件，包括传感器、电子控制单元、车载信息娱乐系统和远程信息处理单元，其中漏洞可能危及资产、用户和车辆操作。这些漏洞是...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
items.title_cn: Muon何时帮助代理强化学习？
items.summary: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. We study vanilla Muon in sparse-reward agentic RL through matched single-seed comparisons with AdamW on ALFWorld using Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. Under Group-in-Group ...
items.summary_cn: Muon在大规模预训练中与AdamW竞争，但其在强化学习（ RL ）后训练中的价值尚不清楚。我们使用Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct在ALFWorld上通过与AdamW的匹配单种子比较来研究稀疏奖励药剂RL中的香草Muon。...
items.comment: 论文看着高大上，代码开源了吗？复现了吗？别光说不练。

items.title: An Exam for Active Observers
items.summary: Human vision is a closed loop: gaze is continuously redirected by intermediate hypotheses rather than a single snapshot. Decades of psychophysics and cognitive science have argued that this active observation is essential for a wide range of tasks. Whether today's multimodal large language models (M...
items.summary_cn: 人类的视觉是一个闭环：目光被中间假设而不是单个快照连续重定向。数十年的心理物理学和认知科学认为，这种积极的观察对于广泛的任务至关重要。当今的多模态大型语言模型（ M...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Netflix paid $587M for Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking startup
items.title_cn: Netflix为Ben Affleck的人工智能电影创业公司支付了5.87亿美元$
items.summary: Netflix revealed that it paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, a startup co-founded by Ben Affleck.
items.summary_cn: Netflix透露，它以5.87亿美元现金收购了由Ben Affleck共同创立的创业公司InterPositive。
items.comment: 商业化产品发布，先看定价策略，再决定要不要入坑。

items.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
items.title_cn: 苹果的诉讼会破坏OpenAI的硬件计划吗？
items.summary: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.
items.summary_cn: 在《Equity》的最新一集中，我们讨论了苹果的诉讼是否会影响OpenAi备受争议的硬件上市计划。
items.comment: 法规来了，短期阵痛难免，长期看是行业走向成熟的必经之路。

items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: The battle over robotaxi rules
items.title_cn: TechCrunch Mobility ：机器人出租车规则之争
items.summary: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.
items.summary_cn: 欢迎回到TechCrunch Mobility ，这是您未来交通的枢纽，现在，人工智能比以往任何时候都更能发挥作用。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。
